subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received, attained unto the glance of grace and was adorned with hearing. Praise thou the Desired One of all worlds, Who hath confirmed thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید بلحاظ عنایت فائز و باصغا مزین حمد کن مقصود عالمیان را که ترا موید
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
